scripts.build: pnpm --dir packages/tools run turbo -- run build
scripts.test: pnpm --dir packages/tools run turbo -- run test
scripts.dev: pnpm --dir packages/tools run turbo -- run dev --filter=ui
scripts.format: pnpm --dir packages/tools run turbo -- run format
scripts.format:check: pnpm exec oxfmt --check packages/ui packages/bridge package.json turbo.json
scripts.check: pnpm run tooling:check && pnpm --dir packages/tools run turbo -- run build test
